hero.title: Chintanatun Chintamuktikade
hero.subtitle: (Maratha Samaj)
hero.description: Break free from the mental traps holding you back. The definitive guide to decoding modern success and finding clarity in chaos.

list.title: While Starting a Business
topics: Business Knowledge
Knowledge About Buying and Selling
What to Do? What Not to Do?
Don't Take Toxic Risks
Handicraft/Skill is More Important Than Trading

list.title: Capital and Discussions on Capital
topics: How to Raise Money for Business
The Importance of Current, CC, and Savings Accounts

list.title: Independent Business, Partnerships & Family
topics: Partnerships and Their Challenges
Discussing Partnerships with Others
Lack of Communication: What Exactly is a Meeting?
Why Meetings Should Always be Held
Don't Let the Business Stagnate

list.title: How to Manage a Business
topics: Emotions Have No Value in Business
Managing the Business
Success and Failure are Parts of the Trade
Avoid Interference from Friends, Relatives, and Non-Professionals
Emotions Should Not Enter Transactions

list.title: Commercial Space and Its Importance
topics: Starting a New Business in Your Own Space
Rented Spaces and Opinions on Them
Choose a Location Taking Advice from Experienced People

list.title: Handling Workers & Their Problems
topics: How to Train Workers
What Will the Future Labor Situation Be?
How Domestic Workers are Created
The Difference Between Others' Employees and Ours
The Labor Situation Will Be Very Difficult in the Future

list.title: While Doing Any Business
topics: Manufacturers and Traders: It's Not Just About Setup
Consistency is Important
Returns and Profits from Inherent Skills

list.title: The Importance of Written Records
topics: Lending, Borrowing, Credit, and Household Transactions
Causes of Losses: Lack of Written Records
Written Things Like Laws and Agreements Hold Importance

list.title: Why Good Businesses Eventually Decline
topics: Unexpected and Hidden Costs
Once the Business Graph Goes Down, It Doesn't Come Back Up
Innovation Must be Brought into Any Business

list.title: Maratha Entrepreneurs and Disputes
topics: Getting Angry Quickly, Inability to Communicate
Our Language, Its Consequences, and How Words Hurt
Money Can Be Invested, But Can't Be Extracted Easily
Lack of Business Knowledge
Pros and Cons of Compromise

list.title: Moving Towards a Stable Business
topics: Why You Should Travel the World
Who to Keep Business Contacts With
Reviewing the Past While Growing the Business
What Was Gained and Lost Over Time

list.title: What Was Achieved Moving Forward?
topics: Good and Bad Experiences in Business
How to Digest Success and Face Failure

list.title: Discussion About Complaints
topics: Whose Help to Take; Whose Not To
Our Own People Don't Help
Why Help; Who to Help; Who Not to Help
When Does Help Become Profitable or Disadvantageous

list.title: Do Maratha Professionals Grow or Not?
topics: Once a Maratha Professional Falls, They Don't Rise Again
What Care to Take While Growing a Business
Money Cannot Give Birth to Money
Income From a Single Business is Dangerous

list.title: How Maratha Professionals are Demoralized
topics: Economic Demoralization
Social Demoralization

list.title: Reason for Writing the Book
topics: Every Community United, But the Maratha Community Did Not
Others Have Written for Business and Politics
The Dangers of Writing: What to Do and What Not to Do
Raising Questions and Providing Guidance for Society
A List for Business Guidance

list.title: Efforts Made to Build the Community
Navigating Partnerships & Family Business.
list.desc: Discover the hidden pitfalls of business partnerships and why structured communication is crucial to prevent your business from stagnating.

list.title: Keeping Emotions Out of Business.
list.desc: Learn why mixing emotions, friends, and relatives with business is a recipe for disaster. Master the art of practical, ruthless business management.

list.title: Why Good Businesses Eventually Fail.
list.desc: Uncover the hidden costs and lack of innovation that cause successful businesses to decline, and learn how to keep your growth graph pointing upward.

list.title: The Cost of Anger & Poor Communication.
list.desc: Master your words and temper. Understand how poor communication damages business relationships and traps your hard-earned money.

list.title: Breaking the Cycle of Stagnation.
list.desc: Learn why relying on a single income stream is dangerous and discover the exact strategies needed to scale and bounce back from failure.

mainHero.quote: !! No matter how powerful our words, thoughts, or ancestors may be... without proving ourselves, these titles have no value. !!

author.name: Kailasrao Tukaram Turkane Patil
author.quote: Writing in Marathi to empower the next generation of local entrepreneurs.
author.para1: This literature has been created to provide the Maratha community with the right direction, clear thoughts, and a positive vision. The primary goal is to offer the right ideology to farmers, entrepreneurs, professionals, and the new generation from a business perspective.
author.para2: It provides guidance in extremely simple and understandable language on how to correct often misguided attitudes in society, develop a business mindset, and empower everyone to stand strong and capable in their respective fields.

review.title: Trusted by Thousands of Entrepreneurs
review.subtitle: A book that has brought positive change to the lives of thousands of readers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Desc: When you visit SahakarStree, register, pre-book, or make a purchase, we collect personal information including your name, email, phone number, shipping address, and order history. We do not collect or store raw payment details (like credit card numbers).
privacy.s2Desc1: To process and fulfill physical and digital book orders.
privacy.s2Desc2: To communicate shipping updates via SMS/WhatsApp and Email.
privacy.s2Desc3: To manage your Referral Code payouts and tracking.
privacy.s3Desc: We implement strict security measures. Payment processing is handled by secure, PCI-compliant gateways (PhonePe). Shipping addresses are shared securely with our logistics partner (Delhivery) solely for delivery purposes.
privacy.s4Desc: We use cookies to maintain your session, keep items in your cart, and analyze site traffic securely.
privacy.s5Desc: For privacy concerns, email us at privacy@sahakarstree.in.

refund.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund.s1Desc: We accept returns for physical books within 7 days of delivery ONLY if the book is damaged or misprinted. Please contact us with photographic proof for a free replacement. Standard buyer's remorse returns are not accepted.
refund.s2Desc: Due to the nature of digital goods, all sales of E-Books and downloadable materials are strictly final and non-refundable once accessed or downloaded.
refund.s3Desc: Approved refunds will be processed automatically to your original payment method (via PhonePe) within 5-7 business days.
refund.s4Desc: You may cancel a physical order before it has been dispatched (manifested by Delhivery). Once an AWB tracking number is generated, the order cannot be canceled.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Desc: By accessing SahakarStree, pre-booking, or purchasing, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.s2Desc: All content, book text, excerpts, and branding are the property of the Author and SahakarStree. Unauthorized distribution, piracy, or sharing of digital copies is strictly prohibited and legally actionable.
terms.s3Desc: The SahakarStree referral program tracks successful purchases. Payouts or discounts earned through referrals are subject to verification. We reserve the right to cancel referral earnings in cases of fraud or abuse.
terms.s4Desc: Prices, shipping rates, and stock availability are subject to change dynamically. We reserve the right to modify or cancel orders in the event of stock inaccuracies.

delivery.title: Shipping & Delivery Policy
delivery.s1Desc: All physical book orders are typically processed and handed over to our logistics partner within 1-2 business days.
delivery.s2Desc: We proudly partner with Delhivery for nationwide fulfillment. Once dispatched, you will receive an AWB tracking number on your dashboard and via email to track your package live.
delivery.s3Desc: Standard delivery takes 3 to 7 business days depending on your pin code. Remote areas may take longer.
delivery.s4Desc: Shipping charges are calculated dynamically at checkout based on your delivery pin code and the weight of the package. Digital products have no shipping fees.
delivery.s5Desc: If a package is returned to us due to an incorrect address provided by the user, or if the user is unavailable after multiple delivery attempts, the user will be responsible for the secondary shipping charge to resend the item.
